name: ai-process-pack
description: Marketplace local do ai-process-pack: catalogo de plugins que distribuem o processo de demandas portavel (feature/issue/backlog/promote/ready/finish/status) para Claude Code, Codex e Antigravity.

plugins.name: ai
plugins.description: Pack de processo: skills /ai:feature, /ai:issue, /ai:backlog, /ai:promote, /ai:ready, /ai:finish, /ai:status (thin wrappers sobre core/src/ai.py).
